💬 Our Cute Conversations 💬

💬 Our First Convo

Our very first words… started with a birthday wish and turned into everything 💬💕

Happy birthday 🥳 Thank you praneetha. ⭐ Pe exam ela rasavu? Niceeee I think it went nice 😊 What abt u?

😊 Cute Flirty Convo

That silly, cute flirty conversation where we couldn't stop smiling 😊💖

Hello darling 🥰 Tinnava? ❤️ Ledu… Nuvvu gurthuvachavu kadupunindi 💝😔 Ayooo Ala antey ela bangaaram? Nannu vachi thinipinchamantaava? 😉😍

🌙 "The Moon Is Beautiful" Texts

The sweetest text exchange — sending love without even saying it directly 🌙💕

And pranku… The moon is beautiful. Isn't it? 🌙 Harshaaaa 😭😭😭 That was so sweet, rey 😭 Finally 😂😭 I couldn't agree more 😭 ❤️ I feel so dumb for not getting it 😭 U finally got it no 😊

😂 The "Crush Andi" Convo

When she asked who my crush was and I just said "Crush andi" — and she said "Nuvve ippudu 🤩👍" That moment 🥹💕

Ngl I'm very curious to know!! Entidhi andi 😭😭😭 Crush andi 😍 Nuvve ippudu 🤩👍

🌙 The Moon Is Beautiful, Isn't It? 🌙

"The moon is beautiful isn't it" — in Japanese, this is a classic way to say I love you 🌙💕

The moment he said "The moon is beautiful isn't it ani" 🌙
"I love you to the moon baby 🥰😍❤️" — Brooo 😭🤣
